channel.title: Retail Management Technology on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Retail Management Technology on RaihnForge

item.title: Loyalty Program Project
item.description: A note on naming. The original paper named the specific EdTech employer, its flagship product, the cities and platforms involved, and the CRM and support tools in use. For public posting, all of these have been generalized: “the organization,” “the survey platform,” “the sales CRM,” “the support platform,” “a major cloud productivity suite,” and similar. The analytical content is preserved. The intent was always portfolio reflection on customer relationship design, not commentary on any specific commercial entity.

item.title: Loyalty Program Description
item.description:
A note on naming. The original paper named the specific EdTech employer and its flagship product. For public posting, both have been generalized: “the EdTech employer” and “the survey platform.” The analytical content is preserved. The intent was always portfolio reflection on the discipline of project framing, not commentary on any specific commercial entity.

TO: Course Instructor FROM: Joshua Keyes DATE: September 30, 2023 SUBJECT: Loyalty Program Description, A01

item.title: The Buyer's Experience
item.description:
A note on naming. The original paper named the specific vendor and salesperson. For public posting, both have been generalized: “the vendor” and “the sales representative.” The analysis is preserved verbatim. The intent was always portfolio reflection on the frameworks, not commentary on any individual professional.

TO: Robert Lupton FROM: Joshua Keyes DATE: June 2, 2023 SUBJECT: The Buyer’s Experience, Final

Product Information

One of my responsibilities as project manager for my employer is assisting in the vetting of potential vendors that are involved in our SOC 2 certification project. I was responsible for leading the search for the needed auditing firm that would be a good fit for our organization’s specialization and processes. We have already been utilizing a compliance monitoring platform as a consulting and monitoring vendor for certification readiness. When it came time for audit selection, that platform recommended several firms to us, and the vendor described below was one of them. I scheduled an appointment and met with the vendor as part of our procurement process on Friday, November 4, at ten in the morning. The sales representative was the point of contact. The meeting was conducted virtually through Zoom (Keyes, 2022).

item.title: Notes on Earning Commitment
item.description:
A note on naming. The original filename in the course archive referenced “RMT370” by typo; the content was prepared for the RMT 340 Earning Commitment unit and has been filed there.

COURSE: RMT 340, Influencing Customer Decisions FROM: Joshua Keyes DATE: May 21, 2023 SUBJECT: Notes on Earning Commitment

Six Principles of Influence

  1. Reciprocity. This principle suggests that people feel obligated to repay others in kind for what they have received. When someone does something nice for us or gives us a favor, we tend to feel the need to reciprocate and return the favor.

item.title: Three Facts, Three Questions
item.description: A note on naming. The original paper named the specific EdTech employer, its flagship product, and the device and productivity ecosystem the platform depends on. For public posting, all of these have been generalized: “the organization,” “the survey platform,” and “a major cloud productivity suite and device ecosystem.” The analysis is preserved. The intent was always portfolio reflection on the habit of pre-employment diligence, not commentary on any specific commercial entity.

item.title: Identify Prospective Employers
item.description:
A note on naming. The original paper named the student’s current employer. For public posting, that entry has been generalized to “the EdTech employer.” Public companies that the student was researching as future career targets remain named, since identifying them is the whole point of a prospective-employer exercise.

TO: Course Instructor FROM: Joshua Keyes DATE: January 14, 2023 SUBJECT: Identify Prospective Employers, A01

Organizational Internship Interest

The following is a list of internships that I would be interested in applying for, with quick reference notes for each.
